resources.string: Your device was locked by Kopanow Loan Services. Call 0664212529.
✓ Rejeleo limetumwa! Msimamizi wa Kopanow atathibitisha na kufungua simu yako hivi karibuni.
Tayari imetumwa — inasubiri uthibitisho wa msimamizi. Tafadhali subiri.
Rejeleo hili tayari limethibitishwa na kushughulikiwa.
Muundo wa namba si sahihi. Ingiza namba ya herufi 10 kutoka kwa ujumbe wako wa M-Pesa (mfano: RCK8XY1234).
Till: 8681154 (Mix by Yas Lipa na M-Pesa)\nBusiness: ELEGANSKY MICROFINANCE 1
Lipia kwenye Till hapo juu, kisha ingiza namba ya uthibitisho (transaction / confirmation ID) kutoka ujumbe wako wa M-Pesa.
Transaction ID (when you did not pay with your registered number)

Registered M-Pesa numbers: payments to Till 8681154 (ELEGANSKY MICROFINANCE 1) are picked up automatically from our system when your SMS is ingested.\nIf you paid with another SIM, enter the transaction ID here (or after saving, tap Check / refresh) so we can match it in Supabase and mark your installment paid.
Could not load your submitted references. Check your connection and tap Refresh.
Payment matched — your loan balance was updated.
Not matched yet. Wait a minute after paying, then tap Check / refresh.
Enter the PIN provided by Kopanow support to unlock your device. Call 0664212529.
Enter the PIN provided by Kopanow support. Call 0664212529.
⛔ Security alert active. Contact support 0664212529 to unlock.
Majaribio mengi mabaya. Kopanow amearifiwa. Piga simu: 0664212529
Your weekly repayment was not received. A security PIN is required — call support 0664212529.
SECURITY ALERT: This device is now locked. Your attempt to disable protection has been logged. Call 0664212529.
Security Alert: Unauthorized attempt to disable device protection. Call 0664212529.
Locked due to a security violation. Call 0664212529.
Please make a payment to unlock your device. Call 0664212529.

Kopanow monitors device activity to ensure loan agreement compliance. This service detects attempts to disable device management and re-engages the lock screen to protect both the lender and borrower. Support: 0664212529.
